keyword: pet camera night vision infrared vs color
title: Pet Camera Night Vision: Infrared vs. Color — Which to Pick
meta: How IR and full-color night vision differ, and which suits a pet owner.
intro: Night vision lets you check on a pet in a dark room. Infrared is invisible but black-and-white; color needs a light but shows detail.

sections.body: Invisible to pets, black-and-white, no light disturbance. Best for not waking a sleeping pet.
Uses a dim warm light to show color; better for identifying what your pet is chewing.
Check the stated range; cheap cameras wash out past a few feet.

faq.a: Color helps you see what they're getting into; IR is less disruptive.
